title: Fire Detection Record
description: A single active fire detection hotspot record from NASA FIRMS, as returned in the CSV area fire detections endpoint. Field names and units follow MODIS/VIIRS standard column naming.

latitude.description: Center latitude of the fire detection pixel in decimal degrees (WGS84).

longitude.description: Center longitude of the fire detection pixel in decimal degrees (WGS84).

brightness.description: Channel 21/22 brightness temperature (Kelvin) for MODIS, or I-4 brightness temperature (Kelvin) for VIIRS.

acq_date.description: Date of satellite acquisition in YYYY-MM-DD format.

acq_time.description: Time of satellite acquisition in HHMM UTC format.

satellite.description: Name of the satellite (e.g., Terra, Aqua, Suomi-NPP, NOAA-20, NOAA-21, LANDSAT-8).

confidence.description: Detection confidence level. For MODIS: numeric 0-100 or categorical (l=low, n=nominal, h=high). For VIIRS: low, nominal, high.

version.description: Version of the FIRMS data collection and processing type (e.g., 6.1NRT, 6.1SP).

bright_t31.description: Channel 31 brightness temperature (Kelvin) for MODIS detections.

frp.description: Fire Radiative Power (MW) — measure of fire intensity.

daynight.description: Day (D) or Night (N) flag at time of satellite acquisition.
